requirement_text: POST /auth/register creates user with hashed password and default viewer role
target_value: 201 with user object no password in response

requirement_text: POST /auth/login returns JWT token for valid credentials
GET /books returns paginated list with default 20 per page max 100
GET POST PUT DELETE /books with proper status codes
target_value: 201 on create 200 on read/update 204 on delete

requirement_text: ISBN must be unique and valid 10 or 13 digits with 422 on invalid
Users have roles: admin staff viewer
target_value: Role persisted and returned in profile

requirement_text: Create/update books requires admin or staff and delete requires admin only
GET /users and PUT /users/:id/role require admin role
